title: Home
meta_description: Learn more about how we can help you reach your goals with tailored advice and proven strategies. Free initial consultation.
about_text:
Located in the heart of Copenhagen, we support migrant workers in Denmark with a holistic, non-bureaucratic approach to navigating the Danish labor market and beyond — through counseling, a weekly support group, and free English classes.

We're run by volunteers and funded by donations, and everyone is welcome, regardless of background, language, or how long you've been here.
highlight_text: When Wolt couriers saw their pay for short deliveries drop, we gave them a space to organize. What started as a meeting of 25 people grew into a movement of more than 300.
